title: Tsunami Disasters
description: Unleash devastating and endlessly spreading tsunamis with a single bucket.
body:
# Tsunami Disasters

**Sometimes you just want to wash the whole world away.**
I made this mod for one reason: total chaos. It introduces a mechanic that lets you unleash a massive, endless flood that actually destroys the terrain as it spreads.

### How it works
It’s pretty simple, but dangerous.
* **The Tsunami Bucket:** I added a new item called the "Tsunami Water Bucket" (you can find it in the new "Disasters" tab).
* **The Flood:** When you place this water, it doesn't behave like normal Minecraft water. It spreads **aggressively and infinitely**.
* **Destruction:** It doesn't just cover the land; it washes it away. Dirt, sand, grass, trees—they all get destroyed by the current. Only hard blocks like Obsidian can stop it.

### A Very Serious Warning
I am not kidding when I say **this will ruin your world.**
The flood does not stop. Once you place that bucket, the water will keep spreading until your entire map is underwater.

**Do not use this on a save file you care about.** This is strictly for messing around or testing how long your PC can survive the fluid calculations.

Have fun! (And bring a boat.)

Want to create your own mod?

Join discord server: https://discord.gg/hSQpP4Mc
